questions.text: When you're reading for fun right now — what's your current read? Are you working through a specific book, doing a reread of something, or bouncing between a few? And do you find yourself seeking out specific types of books depending on your mood, or do you just pick up whatever looks interesting?

When you game — are you more of a single-player story person, or do you need multiplayer/competitive to really get into it? Like, are you the type who wants a deep narrative experience, or do you prefer jumping into something with friends for a session?

Beyond just knowing you have contemplative practices — what's actually working for you right now? Like, is it meditation apps (Headspace, Calm, Waking Up), do you just do your own thing, is it more of a physical practice like journaling or walking, or is it something else entirely?

Do you think about your credit and banking setup at all — like, do you have a specific strategy for credit cards (Chase, capital one, no annual fee), or is it just whatever card works? And do you prefer keeping everything at one bank or spreading it across multiple institutions?

Since you're living internationally and bouncing between Mexico and the US — do you have any estate planning, power of attorney, or legal documents sorted for that? Like, is that something you've looked into, or is it one of those things that's on the 'someday' list?
